summary: Completed all 3 prerequisites and 24 steps for dirty/demand cone + sequential scheduler. Implemented: ReverseDependencyIndex (deps.rs), DemandRegistry with rebuild_cone (demand.rs), compute_dirty_cone/topological_sort/compute_eval_set (dirty.rs), NodeEvaluator trait + SequentialScheduler (reify-runtime). Integration test moved to reify-runtime to avoid circular dev-dependency type issues. 100 tests total (92 reify-eval + 8 reify-runtime), all passing.

Fixed 5 clippy lints in reify-eval: added Default impls for DemandRegistry and ReverseDependencyIndex, collapsed nested if statements in deps.rs and dirty.rs, replaced redundant closure with function reference in deps.rs

Completed all 5 remaining review-round-1 fix steps. Step 25: wrote failing test exposing duplicate-reads bug in topological_sort (a*a expression causes node to be silently dropped). Step 26: fixed bug by deduplicating reads in the in-degree counting phase using HashSet. Steps 27-29: strengthened three zero-assertion demand_registry tests with proper assertions using minimal graphs built via TopologyTemplateBuilder, added cone_size() method. Fixed unused import warnings. 101 tests total (93 reify-eval + 8 reify-runtime), all passing. All 29 steps + 3 prerequisites now complete.

Completed all 1 prerequisite and 12 steps for incremental evaluator pipeline integration. Pre-1: Added mark_pending() to CacheStore. Steps 1-2: Canary backward-compat test + Engine refactored to hold Snapshot, ReverseDependencyIndex, trace_map, DemandRegistry. Steps 3-4: Basic edit_param() method. Steps 5-6: Snapshot provenance (Initial/Edit). Steps 7-8: Dirty/demand cone wiring in edit_param for partial re-evaluation. Steps 9-10: Content-hash early cutoff dynamically shrinks eval set. Steps 11-12: Freshness propagation (Final→Pending→Final). 131 reify-eval tests + 8 reify-runtime = 139 total, all passing.
